overall.description: A cinematic drive through the industrial wasteland outskirts of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, approaching the neon-lit skyline during golden hour. The camera navigates dirt roads past chain-link fences and power transmission towers, making a detour past the illuminated city sign before continuing along the waterfront toward the metropolis.

agents.ego_description: driving forward along a dirt road toward the distant city skyline, passing industrial tanks and fences on the left

entered.detail: large rectangular advertisement sign with red frame
cluster of cylindrical metal storage tanks behind fencing
metal security fencing running parallel to the road
unpaved dusty road with tire tracks leading toward the city
futuristic metropolis with tall skyscrapers silhouetted against the sunset
open-air metal roof structure with support beams
tall electrical pylons with multiple cross-arms and cables

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate industrial wasteland road during golden hour, with the camera driving forward toward the distant Night City skyline. Industrial storage tanks and chain-link fences line the left side while a metal shelter structure appears briefly on the right. The warm backlighting creates long shadows across the dusty terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial perimeter road with mountain backdrop

events.description: camera makes a sharp left turn, shifting the city skyline from center to right side of frame

agents.ego_description: turning left along the industrial perimeter, revealing the mountain range to the right while the city moves to the side view

entered.detail: dark silhouetted hills and mountains forming the backdrop
large illuminated sign with 'Night City' text in orange neon
low-rise warehouse structures with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: The camera executes a sharp left turn, reorienting the view so that the Night City skyline shifts to the right side of the frame while dark mountains dominate the background. An illuminated 'Night City' sign comes into view on the left as the vehicle travels along the industrial perimeter road, passing warehouse buildings and continuing alongside the chain-link fence.

events.description: camera turns right to face the city again, passing the illuminated Night City sign

agents.ego_description: turning right to reorient toward the city center, passing the Night City welcome sign and entering a curved section with guardrails

entered.detail: red and white striped metal barrier along the right side of the road
leafless barren trees lining the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right to face the city skyline once more, passing the illuminated Night City sign which then exits the frame. Red and white guardrails appear on the right side of the road alongside dead trees, while the camera settles into a straight approach toward the distant metropolis. The industrial fencing on the left continues as the road curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront approach road to city center

events.description: water body becomes visible on the right side as the road approaches the bay

agents.ego_description: driving straight toward the city skyline along the waterfront road, with the bay visible on the right

entered.detail: calm bay water reflecting the sunset light between the road and the city
abandoned industrial structures and debris along the left roadside

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a prolonged straight drive toward the Night City skyline along a waterfront road. The guardrails and dead trees continue on the right, where a body of water becomes visible, reflecting the golden hour light. Industrial ruins line the left side as the city towers grow progressively larger in the frame, dominating the horizon with their glass and steel facades backlit by the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a desolate industrial wasteland that gradually converges on the towering, neon-lit skyline of Night City. It begins on a dusty road during golden hour, moving past industrial storage tanks and chain-link fences under warm, heavy backlighting. As the camera executes a sharp left turn, the perspective shifts to reveal dark mountains in the background and an illuminated Night City sign on the left, passing warehouse buildings along the perimeter. The vehicle then turns right to face the metropolis once more, leaving the sign behind and gliding past red and white guardrails and dead trees. Finally, the road opens into a straight waterfront path where the golden light reflects off the water, and the city towers grow progressively larger until their glass and steel facades dominate the horizon.
